prestazioni: Engine: 2.4L Turbo T24A-FTS (G16E-GTS derived block, forged internals) with HKS GT-SS turbocharger (GT-SS42-5T, 1.05 A/R turbine housing) and custom 3.5" titanium downpipe by Tomei Powered, supporting 450+ hp on E85 with HKS Hi-Power fuel pump and 1000cc ID injectors (ID1000xDS).

Drivetrain: OS Giken Super Lock LSD (OS G12-2WAY) with reinforced 8-speed Direct Shift-8AT transmission (Aisin AA81E) modified with PTTuning valve body and upgraded torque converter (Sonnax billet stator, 300M steel hub).

Suspension: Öhlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (CROWN-RS specific valving, 20-way adjustable compression/rebound) paired with Cusco 2-point front strut bar (Type RS) and Whiteline adjustable rear sway bar (24mm, hollow).
estetica: Aero: Veilside Fortune 03 widebody conversion kit (Crown RS-specific, carbon fiber fenders with integrated canards) and custom 3D-printed rear diffuser by Rocket Bunny (Pandem Crown RS prototype, 2023).
Wheels: WORK Meister S1 3P 19x9.5 +22 front / 19x10.5 +30 rear (matte gunmetal) with custom 5x114.3 hubcentric spacers (15mm front, 25mm rear) by WedsSport.

Interior: Bride Zeta III RS bucket seats (Sabelt 6-point harnesses) with custom rear seat delete (carbon fiber panel by AutoTechnic) and MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel (350mm, suede, Crown RS embroidered).
